hub.title: vMarket Support Center
hub.description: vMarket is V-sys's enterprise showcase and online marketplace platform. It gives your company, products, and services global exposure, connecting buyers and sellers to reach more potential customers.

contact.title: Need More Help?
contact.desc: If you encounter any issues or need further assistance, please:
contact.note: We continuously update our features and documentation to provide a better experience.
contact.detailDesc: If the above content didn't answer your question, feel free to

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started Guide
gettingStarted.intro: Welcome to vMarket! This guide will help you quickly understand vMarket's features and how to use them.
gettingStarted.whatIsDesc: vMarket is V-sys's enterprise showcase and online marketplace platform. It allows companies to publicly display their company information, products, and services, helping buyers easily find what they need while enabling sellers to reach more potential customers.
gettingStarted.vworkRel1: Companies manage their company data, products, and services in vWork
gettingStarted.vworkRel2: vMarket automatically syncs and publicly displays data from vWork
gettingStarted.vworkRel3: Update once in vWork, vMarket syncs automatically — no duplicate maintenance needed
gettingStarted.buyerDesc: As a buyer, you can directly on vMarket:
gettingStarted.buyerStep1: Browse all listed products, services, and companies
gettingStarted.buyerStep2: Use the search feature to quickly find products or services you need
gettingStarted.buyerStep3: Use industry category filters to narrow your browsing
gettingStarted.buyerStep4: Use the map feature to view company locations
gettingStarted.buyerStep5: Click a company card to visit their official page for more details
gettingStarted.sellerDesc: As a seller, you can showcase your company, products, and services on vMarket:
gettingStarted.sellerStep1: First, create your company account and profile in vWork
gettingStarted.sellerStep2: Add your products and services in vWork
gettingStarted.sellerStep3: Go to the vMarket settings page in vWork and enable the 'Join vMarket' switch
gettingStarted.sellerStep4: Your company, products, and services will automatically be publicly displayed on vMarket
gettingStarted.freeDesc: Joining vMarket is free of charge. You can join or leave at any time.
gettingStarted.nextStep1Suffix: to see listed companies and products

browse.title: Browse Marketplace
browse.intro: vMarket provides three main directories — products, services, and companies — so you can easily find the resources you need.
browse.productsStep1: Go to the vMarket homepage and click Products in the navigation bar
browse.productsStep2: The page will show a list of products from all listed companies
browse.productsStep3: Products are grouped by company, showing each company's name, logo, and product count
browse.productsStep4: Click any product to go to that company's product detail page
browse.servicesStep1: Go to the vMarket homepage and click Services in the navigation bar
browse.servicesStep2: The page will show a list of services from all listed companies
browse.servicesStep3: Services are also grouped by company
browse.servicesStep4: Click any service to go to that company's service detail page
browse.companiesStep1: Go to the vMarket homepage and click Companies in the navigation bar
browse.companiesStep2: The page will show company cards for all companies that have joined vMarket
browse.companiesStep3: Each company card includes: company name, logo, industry, product count, and service count
browse.companiesStep4: Click a company card to visit the company's official page
browse.filterDesc: On the product, service, and company pages, an industry category sidebar appears on the left (desktop) or top (mobile):
browse.filterItem1: Click any industry category to filter companies, products, or services in that industry
browse.filterItem2: Click All Categories to remove the filter and show all content
browse.filterItem3: Each category shows the number of companies in that category
browse.cardNavDesc: Each company card provides multiple quick navigation buttons:
browse.cardNavProductsDesc: View all products from this company
browse.cardNavServicesDesc: View all services from this company
browse.cardNavCompanyDesc: View the company's detailed information page
browse.cardNavMapDesc: View the company's geographic location on a map

search.title: Search
search.intro: vMarket provides a unified keyword search feature to help you quickly find the products, services, or companies you need.
search.howToStep1: You can find the search bar at the top of the vMarket homepage
search.howToStep2: Enter a keyword, such as a product name, service name, or company name
search.howToStep3: The system will search in real time and display matching results
search.howToStep4: Search results are divided into three categories: products, services, and companies
search.scopeDesc: The search feature simultaneously looks for matches in the following content:
search.resultsItem1: Results appear in real time — no need to press a search button
search.resultsItem2: Each search returns a maximum of 20 results
search.resultsItem3: Click any result to go to the corresponding company page for more details
search.tip1: Using specific keywords will give you more precise results
search.tip2: You can enter partial names for fuzzy search
search.tip3: If there are too many results, combine with the industry category filter to narrow them down

map.title: Map
map.intro: vMarket integrates Google Maps, allowing you to visually view the geographic locations of all listed companies.
map.howToStep1: Go to the vMarket homepage and click Map in the navigation bar
map.howToStep2: The map will show location markers for all companies that have joined vMarket and provided an address
map.howToStep3: Use the map's zoom and drag features to browse different areas
map.viewInfoStep1: Click a location marker (pin icon) on the map
map.viewInfoStep2: A popup information window will show the company name and basic information
map.viewInfoStep3: Click the link in the information window to go directly to the company's page for more details
map.zoomDesc: Use the mouse scroll wheel or the +/- buttons on the map
map.dragDesc: Hold the left mouse button and drag the map
map.markerDesc: Each marker represents the location of one company
map.addressNote: A company's address information comes from the company address set in vWork. If you are a business user, please ensure you have correctly filled in your company address in vWork so it displays correctly on the map.

join.title: Join vMarket
join.intro: Learn how to publicly showcase your company, products, and services on vMarket to reach more potential customers.
join.requirementsDesc: To display your company on vMarket, you need:
join.req1: A vWork account (V-sys's enterprise management system)
join.req2: Your company profile created in vWork
join.req3: At least one product or service added in vWork
join.step1: Log in to the vWork admin panel
join.step2: Find vMarket Settings in the left navigation menu (or select join during the website setup flow)
join.step3: Toggle the 'Join vMarket' switch to ON
join.step5: The system will automatically sync your company profile, products, and services to vMarket
join.freeDesc: There is no charge to join vMarket. You can turn off your listing at any time — only content you have set to public will be displayed.
join.benefit1Desc: Your company and products are displayed on vMarket's public pages, allowing more potential customers to find you.
join.benefit2Desc: Update once in vWork, vMarket syncs automatically — no duplicate data maintenance needed.
join.benefit3Desc: Official verification badges give customers more confidence in your business.
join.benefit4Desc: Connect with other businesses and mutually expand your customer base.
join.leaveDesc: If you no longer wish to display your company on vMarket, simply:
join.leaveStep1: Go to vMarket Settings in the vWork admin panel
join.leaveStep2: Toggle the 'Join vMarket' switch to OFF
join.leaveNote: After leaving, your company, products, and services will no longer appear on vMarket. You can rejoin at any time.

manage.title: Manage Listings
manage.intro: Learn how to control which products and services are displayed on vMarket.
manage.autoDesc: When you join vMarket in vWork, the following content is automatically synced to vMarket:
manage.autoItem1: Company Information — company name, logo, industry category, address
manage.autoItem2: Product List — all products set to 'Show on vMarket'
manage.autoItem3: Service List — all services set to 'Show on vMarket'
manage.controlDesc1: Each product and service has a 'Show on vMarket' setting. After joining vMarket, newly created products and services will have this setting enabled by default.
manage.controlDesc2: If you don't want a particular product or service to appear on vMarket:
manage.controlStep1: Go to the vWork admin panel
manage.controlStep2: Open the edit page for that product or service
manage.controlStep3: Find the 'Show on vMarket' option and turn it off
manage.conditionsDesc: For a product or service to display correctly on vMarket, the following conditions must be met:
manage.cond1Desc: The 'Join vMarket' switch in vMarket Settings is ON
manage.cond2Desc: The company account in vWork is in normal active status
manage.cond3Desc: The product or service has not been disabled or deleted
manage.cond4Desc: The product or service's 'Show on vMarket' setting is ON
manage.updateDesc: Any updates made in vWork are automatically reflected on vMarket:
manage.updateItem1: Edit product name, description, image — vMarket updates automatically
manage.updateItem2: Edit service name, description, image — vMarket updates automatically
manage.updateItem3: Edit company name, logo, address — vMarket updates automatically
manage.updateItem4: Add or delete products/services — vMarket syncs automatically
manage.previewDesc: You can visit the vMarket page at any time to see how your company appears in the marketplace. On the vMarket Settings page in the vWork admin panel, click the 'Preview vMarket' button to go there quickly.

account.title: Account & Subscription
account.intro: Manage your vMarket account settings and subscription plan.
account.settingsDesc: Click your user avatar in the top right corner and select Account Settings. You can:
account.settingsItem1: Update personal information (name, email, phone, etc.)
account.plansDesc: The vMarket company showcase feature is free for all vWork users. However, V-sys offers subscription plans for additional advanced features:
account.planFreeFeatures: Join vMarket, basic features, pages include ads
account.vsuiteFeatures: Ad-free, all features, vOffice AI Smart Office, 1,000 vCoin/month
account.vsuiteProFeatures: All vSuite features + enterprise support, data loss prevention, security controls, 2,000 vCoin/month
account.manageSubStep1: Click your user avatar in the top right corner and select Subscription
account.manageSubStep2: View your current subscription plan and expiry date
account.manageSubStep3: Upgrade or downgrade your subscription plan
account.vcoinDesc: vCoin is V-sys's virtual token used to pay for AI-related feature usage. You can view your vCoin balance and transaction history in your account.
account.vcoinItem1: Subscription plans include a monthly vCoin quota
account.vcoinItem2: You can also purchase additional vCoin
account.logoutDesc: Click your user avatar in the top right corner and select Logout to securely sign out. The system supports cross-tab synchronized logout — logging out in one tab will automatically log you out in all other tabs.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.intro: Here are the most frequently asked questions from vMarket users.
faq.a1: vMarket is V-sys's enterprise showcase and online marketplace platform. It allows companies to publicly display their company information, products, and services, helping buyers and sellers connect.
faq.q2: Is there a fee to join vMarket?
faq.a2: . There is no charge to join vMarket. You simply need a vWork account and can join with one click in the vMarket settings.
faq.q3: Do I need a vWork account to list on vMarket?
faq.a3: Yes. vMarket's data comes from the vWork system. You need to first create your company profile, products, and services in vWork, then make them publicly visible through the vMarket settings.
faq.q4: As a buyer, do I need an account to browse vMarket?
faq.a4: . Anyone can browse products, services, and the company directory on vMarket directly, without logging in or registering.
faq.q5: Can I control which products/services appear on vMarket?
faq.a5: Yes. Each product and service has a 'Show on vMarket' setting. You can individually control in vWork which products and services are publicly displayed and which remain private.
faq.q6: Can I leave vMarket at any time?
faq.a6: Yes. Simply go to vMarket Settings in vWork and turn off the 'Join vMarket' switch. After leaving, all your data will no longer appear on vMarket. You can rejoin at any time.
faq.q7: Will vMarket update automatically when I update data in vWork?
faq.a7: . vMarket and vWork sync automatically. Any changes you make in vWork (product names, descriptions, images, company information, etc.) are automatically reflected on vMarket.
faq.q8: What is the difference between free and paid users?
faq.a8: Free users can use all basic vMarket features (company showcase, product listings, etc.), but ads will appear on pages. Subscribing to vSuite or vSuite Pro provides an ad-free experience along with more advanced features.
faq.q9: What if a company's map location is incorrect on vMarket?
faq.a9Desc: A company's map location is automatically generated from the company address entered in vWork. If the location is incorrect, please:
faq.a9Step1: Go to the vWork admin panel
faq.a9Step2: Update the address in Company Settings
faq.a9Step3: Ensure the address is complete and accurate
faq.a10Switch: You can switch languages using the language selector in the top right corner of the page.
faq.q11: What if I have other issues?
faq.a11Desc: If your question is not listed above, please contact us through:

unknown.title: Category Not Found
